title: Level 558
wikitext:
{{VoidedTheme}} {{Headerbox|header=Don't let the voices affect you.|file=558background.png|speed= 1] s}} {{Background|file=558background.png}} {{Class 0|entity=Unconfirmed entities|color-h=#FFFFF}} {{Simple Image Block|image=Level558br.jpg|caption=A street on Level 558}} == Description == '''Level 558''' appears to be a silent residential neighborhood belonging to an unidentified small town. The level has an estimated area of approximately '''3.7 km²''', although its exact boundaries have yet to be confirmed. The environment of the level is permanently locked in a period resembling the final hours of the night, estimated to occur between '''02:00 AM''' and '''04:00 AM'''. No sunrise, sunset, or weather changes have ever been recorded. The sky remains dark and heavily overcast, preventing visibility of stars or the moon. The only sources of illumination within the level are artificial, primarily consisting of: * Hanging Lanterns * Streetlights * Interior house lights * Porsche lights The streetlights throughout the neighborhood frequently flicker at irregular intervals. The cause of this anomaly remains unknown. Curiously, lights located inside houses have never been observed flickering, suggesting that the phenomenon affects only exterior lighting. Exploration of the level suggests the presence of over '''400 houses''' distributed throughout several small streets. Many of these houses appear structurally identical, including architecture, paint color, and yard layout. All documented houses are single-story structures, and no building containing more than one floor has been discovered. However, several structural irregularities have been documented in certain houses, including: * Houses lacking front entrances. * Houses with missing rooms. * Hallways that abruptly terminate. * Houses where expected rooms such as bathrooms, kitchens, or bedrooms are absent. Despite these irregularities, most houses appear fully furnished and seemingly inhabited, although no residents have ever been found. == Phenomena == === The Whispering Phenomenon === One of the most unusual phenomena present within Level 558 involves auditory whispers reported by numerous wanderers. These whispers typically occur when individuals are alone on the streets or inside certain houses. The voices appear to originate from no identifiable direction, often sounding extremely close to the listener. The language used by the voices remains unknown and has not been recognized by any linguistic analysis. However, affected wanderers consistently report being able to clearly understand the meaning of the whispers. When later questioned about the contents of the messages, all recorded individuals responded with unusual emotional distress. Most refused to reveal the information, while others began crying or displayed visible signs of sadness during interviews. Members stationed at the local research outpost have similarly refused to disclose what they heard when questioned. The reason for this secrecy remains unknown. === Shadows in the Windows === Numerous wanderers have reported seeing shadows moving behind curtains or within the windows of houses, frequently resembling human silhouettes. However, all houses investigated following these sightings have been found completely empty. No physical evidence of inhabitants has ever been discovered. == Records == === Incident Log 558-1 === Approximately three weeks after the establishment of the research outpost, a deceased wanderer was discovered suspended from a tree located along one of the residential streets. The individual had improvised a rope using strips of fabric torn from their clothing. Evidence collected at the scene suggested that the individual remained near the tree for an extended period before the incident occurred. Investigators also discovered: * Circular footprints surrounding the tree. * Fabric fragments used in the construction of the rope. * A torn piece of paper containing partially erased writing. Prior to the incident, the wanderer reportedly informed fellow explorers that the whispers were continuously repeating the same message. The contents of the message were never revealed. Current theories suggest that the whispers may induce severe psychological distress in certain individuals. Further research is ongoing. == Discovery == Level 558 was first discovered when a wanderer entered a residential building located within [[Level 9]] and attempted to exit through the same door, only to emerge within an unfamiliar suburban street. Following this report, members of the M.E.G. established a small outpost within the level in order to conduct further research. == Entities == No entities have been officially confirmed within Level 558. Despite this, recurring reports of moving shadows within houses and the whispering phenomenon remain unexplained. == Bases, Outposts and Communities == === M.E.G. - Echo Research Station === The '''M.E.G. Echo Research Station''' is currently the only known outpost operating within Level 558. The station is operated by the [[M.E.G.|Major Explorer Group]] and serves as a research facility dedicated to studying the level's unusual auditory phenomena. '''Information''' * 27 permanent members. * Focused on environmental observation. * Responsible for mapping large portions of the neighborhood. '''Primary Objectives''' * Document structural house anomalies. * Investigate the whispering phenomenon. * Locate additional exits within the level. == Entrances and Exits == === Entrances === * Finding and opening a door marked with the faded text '''"Ronc.H"''' somewhere within [[Level 9]] may lead to Level 558. === Exits === * Turning around and leaving a house through the same door used to enter will cause the wanderer to emerge from a similar house within [[Level 9]].
